summary: Plan-only inventory classification for four open maintainer-ready PRs. No merge recommendation is emitted because none has complete merge preflight evidence. One narrow repair artifact is planned for #86893 because the PR is useful, small, maintainer-modifiable, and currently dirty against main.

actions.reason: Keep in the maintainer-ready pool. It looks viable, but merge is blocked by missing complete merge preflight rather than by a dedupe or repair decision.
A narrow contributor-branch repair is appropriate: rebase/refactor the small dirty branch onto current main, rerun focused validation and /review, and preserve the contributor's source PR credit.
Emit one executable cluster-scoped artifact for the only concrete repair path in this shard; other PRs are unrelated and are not combined into this artifact.
Keep in the maintainer-ready pool while checks and the requested re-review settle. The artifact does not provide enough failure detail for a separate executable repair plan.
Keep in the maintainer-ready pool. It is too early to merge while queued checks and merge preflight are incomplete, and there is no concrete repair blocker to artifact.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #86893 by rebasing the maintainer-modifiable contributor branch onto current main, resolving the narrow cron timer conflict/staleness, preserving the intended long isolated cron cold-runner setup timeout behavior, and refreshing validation plus Codex /review before any merge attempt.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): allow cold isolated runner setup
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair source PR #86893 on its contributor branch by rebasing onto current main.
- Keep the intended isolated cron cold-runner setup timeout behavior and focused regression coverage.
- Preserve attribution to @dredozubov for the original implementation.

## Source credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86893
- Original author: @dredozubov

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review after repair, with findings addressed before merge.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @dredozubov and PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86893.
Do not replace contributor authorship when repairing the editable branch; if a replacement PR becomes necessary, name #86893 and @dredozubov in the PR body.
